phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get English audio guides
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger audioguías en inglés?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR ow-dyoh-GWEE-ahs ehn een-GLEHS?

likely_response.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la taquilla principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition hall is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la sala de exposiciones temporales?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-pe, DON-de ES-ta la SA-la de eks-po-see-SYON-es tem-po-RA-les?

likely_response.local: Suba al segundo piso, junto al auditorio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Second floor, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh HOON-toh AHL ah-oo-dee-toh-REE-oh
responses.local: Suba al segundo piso, junto al auditorio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Altamira Cave replica is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la réplica de la cueva de Altamira?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah RREH-plee-kah deh lah KWEH-vah deh ahl-tah-MEE-rah?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del hall, sala Neocueva.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL AHY SAH-lah neh-oh-koo-EH-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, follow the green signs.

responses.english: Ground floor, follow the green signs.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL AHY SAH-lah neh-oh-koo-EH-bah
responses.local: Al fondo del hall, sala Neocueva.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets for Altamira
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar entradas para Altamira?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh PWEE-do kom-PRAR en-TRA-das pa-rah al-tah-MEE-rah?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la taquilla principal, a la derecha.
